title: Architecture debt (8.2 rearchitecture)
items: Rearchitect feedback() as graph-visible bridge node (8.2 → 9.0) — replaces subscribe-based shortcut; enables proper DIRTY→DATA two-phase on reentry/counter
Rearchitect funnel() bridges as graph-visible nodes (8.2 → 9.0) — replaces subscribe forwarding; resolves §5.9 imperative trigger violation + teardown leak
stratify two-dep gating (8.2 → 9.0) — gate classification on both source and rules settling
